summary: CRITICAL GAPS: Missing SecretRotationValidator.Tests.ps1 (test file does not exist; workflow line 26 will fail immediately). Missing `act` test harness infrastructure and `act-result.txt` artifact (required by task). Missing actionlint validation step in workflow. Logic bug in workflow line 77 (JSON validation condition uses AND where OR is needed; `-not $json.expired -and $json.expired -isnot [array]` is always false). Script itself is well-structured with good PowerShell practices (parameter types, PSCustomObject, proper functions), but TDD requirement completely unfulfilled—no test-first methodology demonstrated. Script lacks error handling in main execution block. Workflow references ./SecretRotationValidator.Tests.ps1 which task requires to be created first but was never delivered.
